testcase.name: [4:81] Validar que ningún balance sea negativo (Integridad Financiera)

failure.message:
match failed: EQUALS $ | not equal (BOOLEAN:BOOLEAN) true false
classpath:org/udea/parabank/account-data-integrity.feature:120
